title: Kibss
description: An affection mod. Give affection to your friends <3
body:
A simple affection mod. Use the `/kiss` commands to give someone a kiss!¹ Kissing is accompanied with a small animation and particle. Both participants need to use the command in order to initiate a kiss. Additionally adds handholding, with similar requirements.

![Two minecraft avatars doing a "kissing" animation. A single heart particle is shown above them. They each have their right leg extended outwards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P8ceGr8k/images/0a19aa67fcb794b72d14b0a11db078d4ea6d63e1.png)

[![Made for ModFest 26](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/26/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)

¹ As roommates of course
